title: Automation: Notification & Due Dates
excerpt: Currently you can set a reminder for every period for the item but not for subitems. It would be great to add reminder “every 2 days time period, if deadline (subitems) has passed, and status (subitems) is not done, noti…

posts.author: kkooner (kkooner@cupe.bc.ca)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently you can set a reminder for every period for the item but not for subitems. It would be great to add reminder “every 2 days time period, if deadline (subitems) has passed, and status (subitems) is not done, notify lead.” If someone knows how to create this, please let me know!
